page_metadata.biotools__summary: Cloud-based platform. Providing bioinformatic analysis of bacteria. Species identification (16S, WGS), typing (MLST, cgMLST, SNP), antibiotic resistance profiling, virulence. Possibility to add metadata for transmission analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Cloud-based platform. Providing bioinformatic analysis of bacteria. Species identification (16S, WGS), typing (MLST, cgMLST, SNP), antibiotic resistance profiling, virulence. Possibility to add metadata for transmission analysis.
